value.string: Bot logging root set by default to logging location used by the bot agent. See the variables for sRootLogDirectory, sBotName and sVendorName.
Creating default log/error directories specific to this bot
Verify Source Path ,Destination Path and Work Path
Source Path (sSourcePath), Destination Path (sDestinationPath) and Work Path (sWorkPath) are required values - please provide their values using edit variable
Creating file if it doesnt previously exist so that the header row can be created
Logging error to file matching header row established format
Taking snapshot. Please disable/remove this action if your screen could potential contain plain text PII
A problem occurred when processing bot. Please check logs for details
Export list of files in source folders to a text file
Check and close all Command Line Windows on desktop
Open command prompt and write command to export list of all files in source folder to a text file
Read exported file to get each *.xls/*.xlsx file's path and convert to *.csv file
Open files list to get each *.xlsx/*.xls file's path and convert to *.csv file
Get each source file path and generate destination file path
Assign pair of source file path and destination file path to a list to run VBScript

Dim oExcel
Set oExcel = CreateObject("Excel.Application")
Dim oBook
Set oBook = oExcel.Workbooks.Open(Wscript.Arguments.Item(0))
oBook.SaveAs WScript.Arguments.Item(1), 6
oBook.Close False
oExcel.Quit
